title: White House warned staff against Iran war bets on prediction markets
summary_full: The warning came after a flurry of unusual activity on oil and stock futures markets shortly before Trump said he would pause attacks on Iran.
summary_public: The warning came after a flurry of unusual activity on oil and stock futures markets shortly before Trump said he would pause attacks on Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump said he would pause attacks on Iran.
